description_long: This is a stylized, blocky airplane with a light gray fuselage and straight, rectangular wings featuring orange-tipped edges. The propeller is mounted at the nose and consists of four black blades with orange tips. The cockpit is centrally located and appears to be open, with a white seat and a red interior. The tail section is upright with a vertical stabilizer, decorated with red and black markings. The wings display simple insignia, and the underside of the wings shows blue elements that may represent landing gear or structural supports.
description: A blocky, light gray airplane with straight orange-tipped wings, a nose-mounted propeller, and a central open cockpit with a red seat.
description_view_0: Side view showing the propeller, open cockpit, and upright tail with red and black markings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full wingspan, blue elements under the wings, and the tail's vertical stabilizer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the cockpit, propeller, and tail details.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the four-bladed propeller, cockpit, and symmetrical wing design with visible insignia.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight rectangular wings with no visible dihedral or winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted propeller engine (piston type implied by propeller).
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed landing gear with two main units under the wings and a tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Mid-fuselage, open single-seat cockpit with a visible seat and no enclosed canopy.
